FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 1

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"show firewall policy 1\nshow firewall policy 2\nshow firewall policy 3"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy 1
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "Block_ICMP_Egress"
        set uuid be0d5f12-250f-51f1-6b47-18a7e38e1827
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Top-priority deny: block ICMP egress from UbuntuComputer to WAN"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy 2
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_HTTP_Src_Ubuntu"
        set uuid c38a715a-250f-51f1-3084-b331f8d29c2b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy 3
config firewall policy
    edit 3
        set name "Allow_LAN_ICMP"
        set uuid c9377710-250f-51f1-2d69-f65a59c3a535
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "LAN_NET"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
